response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performer in the video as Ninomae Ina'nis based on the model and the context of Minecraft gameplay on the Hololive server. 2. Audited the video for any vocal music. The audio primarily consists of in-game sound effects and the performer's own commentary and humming. 3. Concluded that there is no vocal music present in the video, just the performer's speech and ambient sound. 4. Created a single scene covering the entire video with contains_vocal_music set to false.
response.global_summary: Ninomae Ina'nis plays Minecraft on the Hololive server, managing a room filled with chickens and interacting with farm items like sugar cane and bees. She hums and makes comments while playing. There is no vocal music in the clip.

scenes.description: Ninomae Ina'nis plays Minecraft, managing a room full of chickens and working on her farm. She occasionally speaks and hums.
